info.title: LeanCode.ContractsGenerator
info.description:
Copyright 2021-2022 LeanCode Sp. z o.o.
project     Generate contracts from C# project.
file        Generate contracts from a single file.
path        Generate contracts based on globbed path.
protocol    Emit current protocol version.
help        Display more information on a specific command.
version     Display version information.
Running on .NET 10.0.5

options.name: --exclude-external-contracts-from-output
options.description:
Do not include contracts from
referenced assemblies in the
output. Analyzers will still run
on the merged result.

options.name: --project
options.description:
Required. The project file with
contracts. To pass multiple
projects, separate the values with
space.

options.name: --output
options.description:
(Group: output) The output file
path. Use `-` to write the
resulting Protobuf file to
`stdout`.

options.name: --check-only
options.description:
(Group: output) Check the
contracts only. Do not generate
output.

options.name: --allow-date-time
options.description:
Allow usage of System.DateTime
type. Highly discouraged.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
Running on .NET 10.0.5

commands.name: file
commands.description: Generate contracts from a single file.

options.name: --input
options.description: Required. Input file.

options.name: --output
options.description:
(Group: output) The output file path. Use `-` to
write the resulting Protobuf file to `stdout`.

options.name: --check-only
options.description:
(Group: output) Check the contracts only. Do not
generate output.

options.name: --allow-date-time
options.description:
Allow usage of System.DateTime type. Highly
discouraged.

options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version

commands.name: path
commands.description: Generate contracts based on globbed path.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Required. Include files from glob pattern. To
pass multiple patterns, separate them with
space.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Exclude files from glob pattern. Has higher
precedence than includes. To pass multiple
patterns, separate them with space.

options.name: --directory
options.description:
The base directory used for globbing. Uses
current directory if not specified.

options.name: --output
options.description:
(Group: output) The output file path. Use `-`
to write the resulting Protobuf file to
`stdout`.

options.name: --check-only
options.description:
(Group: output) Check the contracts only. Do
not generate output.

options.name: --allow-date-time
options.description:
Allow usage of System.DateTime type. Highly
discouraged.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
Running on .NET 10.0.5
